---
title: "E. Miller Christen"
subtitle: "M.S. in Statistics" 
image: assets/profile.jpg
image-alt: "Headshot of smiling woman"
about: 
  template: solana
  image-width: 15em 
  image-shape: round
  id: hero-heading
  links:  
    - icon: envelope
      aria-label: "Email"
      href: mailto:millerchristen3@gmail.com     
    - icon: linkedin
      aria-label: "LinkedIn" 
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/miller-christen-a55264218 
    - icon: github
      aria-label: "GitHub"
      href: https://github.com/millzchristen/miller-christen 
    - icon: brands:orcid
      aria-label: "ORCID"
      href: https://orcid.org/0009-0007-4093-1407 
execute:
  freeze: false
  echo: false
  warning: false
header-includes: >
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/index.css">
resources: 
  - assests/index.css
---

::: {#hero-heading}
:::

::: {#hero-content}
I am a graduate student in Statistics at the University of South Carolina with a background in mathematical sciences and physics. My **research interests** focus on machine learning and statistical modeling to study galaxy morphology classification. I'm passionate about **astrostatistics**, **big data**, and applying statistical methods to solve real-world problems.

<br> 

[Learn more about me &rarr;](/about){.about-links .subtitle}
:::
